transcript.text:
With 45 years of tradition
I was told there's always a waitlist every Summer
[Buckwheat Soba and Naengmyeon (Cold Noodles)]
Excuse me [I want everything]
[Order up]
What did you say!?
[Yes, that's correct]
[Very intimate mukbang service]
[Touched]
That is great (Play-on-word as "big stomach" in Korean)
Hello everyone
I'm here at Jeonju today
There's a very famous soba restaurant here
I was told there's always a waitlist every Summer
[A hot place for the locals]
I came here earlier, but the line was way too long

[City of Jeonju, District of Deokjin] [Geumam Soba]
There are 5 items on the menu
It's a bit too late to order a lot of food (Currently 7:43pm)
Their portions are big
So let's do 1 of each
Excuse me,
1 buckwheat soba, 1 spicy soba, 1 soybean noodles, 1 naengmyun, and 1 spicy naengmyun please
[Order up]
What did you say!?
[Who's eating all of that?]
[Double checking]
How are you eating that?
The cold noodles will easily fill your stomach up
[You do you]
[Soybean noodles]
[Naengmyun (cold noodles with sliced Korean pear and boiled egg)]

Wow, looks good
Thank you
It's all here Where should I start?
Let's do the buckwheat soba first
Other places usually serve the noodles on a board
But they just give it to you in a bowl
That's a lot of noodles Check it out
Dip it in the broth
Bon appetit
It's been a while
It's so chewy
Amazing
Let's try the broth
It's very different from your everyday-soba-broth
You can usually taste a lot of the dried skipjack tuna flavor
I can definitely taste the taste of anchovies

Totally different from a regular soba broth
[What? Tzuyang?] Hello
[Notices Tzuyang]
That's so cool
[A very intimate mukbang service]
[Touched]
That's a one-shot
The buckwheat noodles doesn't come with wasabi or radish
It's a very Koreanized version of the dish Maybe because of the strong anchovy broth
Now for the spicy one
Since this is what they're also known for
Don't mix that yet Put some broth in there
Thank you
Oh right, They usually come with sliced cucumbers
I don't like cucumbers, so I made a special request
Spicy soba

The sauce is tasty!
It's not salty at all
You won't be overwhelmed by the sauce
[Almost like watching a YouTube live stream]
The broth is so unique
[I want to know]
Teach me the recipe
[Nope]
What goes in here? Dried seafood
Oh, is that so?
Now that you mention it...
Very unique
[What next?]
Spicy naengmyun I think it won't be too different
A splash of the broth
Mix it up

Well mixed
The noodles are very different when compared side to side
These noodles are good as well
It's a little spicy
[Really spicy]
That's spicy
The sauce really gets to you
[As predicted]
I thought it was very sweet at first
The spiciness creeps up
It's a perfect timing for the soybean noodles
I enjoy soybean noodles a lot
It's hard to find restaurants that are good with soybean noodles
Let's give it a try
[Sprinkle some sugar on it]
Sugar? It's usually salt

It might be my very first time trying soybean noodles with sugar
1 more bite!
Surprisingly, it goes really well with sugar
I've only had it with salt
The soybean soup is very thick It's very delicious
Naengmyun
Is this the same broth as the spicy naengmyun broth?
Excuse me, Are these different?
They taste different if you mix the spicy sauce
So it seems like they use the same broth
But the sauce makes it a whole different broth
It's so much better!
Overall,
It's not an average restaurant It's very special
Something you've never had before
A very savory taste

A healthy flavor
Very hard to explain
[Can't let anything go to waste]
[Last bowl of soba]
[Escapee]
[Cleared]
Spicy naengmyun now
I texted my kids
They are asking why she only ordered 5 bowls when she can eat 10 more bowls
She can double it up
[I'll come back earlier so that I have plenty of time to do it!]
[Speeding up since there's not much time left]
[A bite of the boiled egg]
[She really finished it all]
I'm shocked
Amazing

She needs to be featured on the show "Capture the Moment: How is that Possible"]
[I approve]
Just say that she's great
Just like "big stomach" (Play-on-word)
[Finale]
[A gift]
Have some of this to cool down
With straw!
It's upside-down So cool
I came to the one and only Geumam Soba in the city of Jeonju
It was a very new experience and flavor for me
